div.div: Implementation View - Level 1 - VendNet System (Vending Machine Network)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 394px; height: 1px; padding-top: 121px; margin-left: 704px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
This component represents an abstraction layer over external payment providers (e.g., Stripe, PayPal, Visa).
For the purpose of this project, a mock payment gateway is used to simulate real-world scenarios such as successful transactions, failures, timeouts, and network issues.
Security considerations include:
- No storage of sensitive card data (e.g., CVV)
- Idempotent request handling to prevent duplicate charges
- Input validation and error handling
- Preparedness for secure webhook validation mechanisms
This design allows future integration with real payment providers.
